programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Anchor Anger
programme.desc: The rivalry between captains Dave Carraro and Tyler McLaughlin intensifies, while other boats in the fleet push to bring new mates up tospeed in the North Atlantic Bluefin fishing season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Bluefin Beatdown
programme.desc: An old rivalry re- ignites after a fight at the dock between captains Tyler McLaughlin and Dave Carraro, of FV- tuna.com, while a crewmember fights to keep his job on the Hot Tuna.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Harpoon Hellraising
programme.desc: It's week four of the North Atlantic Blue Fin Tuna Season and oneveteran Gloucester captain has yet to catch his first fish, while two rival harpoon boats go head to head.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Go Hard or Go Home
programme.desc: It's week five of Gloucester's Bluefin tuna fishing season, and when a sudden storm engulfs the fleet, each captain must decide if the risk of staying out on the water is worth the reward.

programme.title: Bent Rods and Broken Hearts
programme.desc: It's week six of the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna fishing season and the Gloucester fleet's underdogs struggle to turn around their seasons.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Maine Event, The
programme.desc: It's week seven of the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna fishing season, Gloucester captains must decide whether go where the fish are biting or take their chances fishing inshore.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Battle At Midway
programme.desc: It's week eight of the Atlantic bluefin tuna season, the midway point of fishing where crews either knuckle down and push hard, or crumble from the grind.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Wicked Pissed
programme.desc: It's week nine of the North Atlantic bluefin tuna season and Captain Paul Hebert, struggles to prove his worth as a captain after catching only three tuna in the first two months of fishing.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: When Push Comes to Shove
programme.desc: It's week ten of the North Atlantic bluefin tuna season in Gloucester, Massachusetts, and, with only six weeks of fishing left, the competition is heating up.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Three’s a Charm
programme.desc: It's week 11 of the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna season, and bad luck, bait problems and big egos plague the Gloucester fleet.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Triple Crossed
programme.desc: It's week 12 of the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna season, and one captain's decision to withhold information fractures ties with an important ally.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Tuna Trifecta
programme.desc: It's week 13 of the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna season and, with only three weeks left to fish, and the number one position on the line, every Gloucester captain is desperate to stack the deck with bluefin.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Knock Out Punch
programme.desc: It's week 14 of the Bluefin tuna season and with less than two weeks of fishing left, the top four Gloucester crews are locked in a tight race to be New England's best Bluefin boat.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Bait and Switch (Finale Part 1)
programme.desc: It's the final week of the season and Hard Merchandise holds a narrow lead over the fleet

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: There are less than five days left before the Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season in Gloucester, Massachusetts closes and the competition will come downto the very last day of fishing

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Masters of Bluefin (Special)
programme.desc: Take a look back at the best moments from previous seasons as the top fishermen of Gloucester, Massachusetts, battle for supremacy while they pursue the elusive Atlantic Bluefin Tuna

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: First Blood
programme.desc: It's the first day of the new Bluefin tuna fishing season in Gloucester, Massachusetts, and every captain in the fleet wants to the land the coveted first tuna of the year.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Anchor Anger
programme.desc: The rivalry between captains Dave Carraro and Tyler McLaughlin intensifies, while other boats in the fleet push to bring new mates up tospeed in the North Atlantic Bluefin fishing season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Bluefin Beatdown
programme.desc: An old rivalry re- ignites after a fight at the dock between captains Tyler McLaughlin and Dave Carraro, of FV- tuna.com, while a crewmember fights to keep his job on the Hot Tuna.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Harpoon Hellraising
programme.desc: It's week four of the North Atlantic Blue Fin Tuna Season and oneveteran Gloucester captain has yet to catch his first fish, while two rival harpoon boats go head to head.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Shadow of A Serial Killer: The Sophie Le Tan Case
programme.desc: On September 7, 2018, in Strasbourg, Sophie Le Tan is about to celebrate her 20th birthday with her family.
programme.sub-title: The Shadow of A Serial Killer: The Sophie Le Tan Case

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Strange Farm: The Anaïs Guillaume Affair
programme.desc: On the night of April 16, 2013, Anaïs Guillaume, 21, mysteriously disappears in Fromy (Ardennes) after spending the evening at her companion's farm.
programme.sub-title: The Strange Farm: The Anaïs Guillaume Affair

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Death Trap On the Road (Schaaf Case)
programme.desc: A damaged bike belonging to Karine Schaaff, 16, is found abandoned by the side of a road in Moselle.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Deathly Fatal Passion At the Hotel (Villermet case)
programme.desc: The body of Nathalie Villermet, 46, manager of a small hotel and -restaurant, is found by a walker in the woods outside Paris, hidden under branches.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Deadly Remedies
programme.desc: Dr. G must decide if she can perform a successful autopsy without the deceased's organs. As she ponders the decision, we are given a rare glimpse into a different side of Dr. G’s job.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: False Impressions
programme.desc: As each lead turns cold in a gruesome murder case, Dr. G worries justice may never be served. As the autopsy draws to an end, Dr. G uncovers a shocking clue that may solve this crime.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Hidden Hazards
programme.desc: A daughter wants to surprise her dad with breakfast in bed but finds him unresponsive. His family is convinced they know what killed him, but Dr. G must let the evidence speak for itself.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Crossing The Line
programme.desc: A teacher excuses himself for a nap after dinner, but he never wakes up. The man has a complex medical history that leads Dr. G on a hunt for an explanation for his mysterious death.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Whispered Warnings
programme.desc: A woman fears the worst when her aunt stops answering her calls. When her greatest fear is confirmed, Dr. G must determine one thing: was this a fatal fall?

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Lethal Intake
programme.desc: A woman is killed in a drunk driving accident. At first, her death seems to be an open-and-shut case, but Dr. G discovers clues that the woman may have played a key role in her own death.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Last Gasps
programme.desc: A mother of infant twins notices that her son is not breathing. EMTs attempt to revive him, but it's too late. Now, Dr. G must work fast to determine if the other twin's life is in danger.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner: Deadly Silence
programme.desc: A florist meets with clients for an upcoming wedding, but she suddenly collapses to the floor. With no apparent cause of death, Dr. G worries that this case may go unsolved.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Nick Gage – The Lying Lothario
programme.desc: Fantasist Gage preyed on lonely women he would meet on dating sites.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Emma Golightly – Lonely Hearts Con Woman
programme.desc: Golightly conned tens of thousands of dollars from men she found in lonely hearts columns and dating sites.
programme.sub-title: Emma Golightly – Lonely Hearts Con Woman

programme.title: Conmen Case Files
programme.desc: Fake celebrity clairvoyant Williams preyed on the elderly by performing fake readings, including one where he directed his client to a forged will.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Robert Hyams – The Suspect Scientist
programme.desc: Hyams posed as a leading scientist and millionaire art buyer before fleeing to California where he posed as a leading academic.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Vanished
programme.desc: A small town public school teacher fails to arrive for work for the first time in thirty years, leaving an empty house and a baffled community.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Jeweler's Wife
programme.desc: The wife of a successful jeweler is found dead in their home. The jeweler immediately falls under suspicion, but he's not alone.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Fat Bandit
programme.desc: A string of bank robberies in Winnipeg confound local police. Most bank-robbers are addicts, usually quite thin. This new man doesn't fit the profile: this bandit is fat.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Frenzy
programme.desc: Three bodies are found in a house, arms tied behind their backs. Stab wounds to the neck. Bloody footprints in the hall. A killing spree that leaves a woman, her boyfriend and a church deacon dead.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Abducted Atheists
programme.desc: American Atheist Madalyn Murray O'Hair and her family vanished in August 1995, leaving behind an ominous note.

programme.title: Crime Stories: Ronald Glenn West: The 22 Caliber Killer
programme.desc: When two suburban housewives are killed in their homes within a week of each other in May 1970, it leaves Toronto in fear.
programme.sub-title: Ronald Glenn West: The 22 Caliber Killer

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Doctor of Death
programme.desc: When emergency services arrived at the office of respected neurologist Richard Boggs following the report of a patient's death, they had their suspicions regarding the circumstances...

programme.title: Crime Stories: Douglas Robert Worth: The Pictou Sadist
programme.desc: On December 11, 1987 a hard luck child living in a group home in Ontario was reported missing when she failed to return home from school.
programme.sub-title: Douglas Robert Worth: The Pictou Sadist

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Homocidal Drifter
programme.desc: In the city of Moncton, New Brunswick police discover the bodies of Joan Hicks and her 11-year-old daughter, Nina ‚Äì both brutally murdered late in the night.

programme.title: World’s Most Evil Killers: Volker Eckert
programme.desc: Volker Eckert, a German truck driver, strangled and killed as many as nineteen women across Europe in a murderous career that lasted over thirty years.

programme.title: World’s Most Evil Killers: Joachim Kroll
programme.desc: Joachim Kroll murdered at least thirteen people during a span of over twenty years.

programme.title: World’s Most Evil Killers: Beverly Allitt
programme.desc: Beverley Allitt killed four children and attempted to murder nine more while working as a nurse at Grantham and Kesteven Hospital in Lincolnshire in 1991.

programme.title: Surviving Evil: From Dire to Deadly
programme.desc: A recent Tennessee high school grad finds herself in the grasp of an aggressive and drug-crazed local thug. Meanwhile, a lonely Alabama divorcee falls for a Latin lover who proves to be a sadistic villain with murder on his mind.

programme.title: Surviving Evil: Killer Smile
programme.desc: A deadly sociopath on a killing spree, Peter John Peters has already left two bodies in his wake. And now he’s parked outside a Niagara Falls area bank where he abducts 28-year-old Sandie Bellows at knifepoint.

programme.title: Surviving Evil: Handcuffed
programme.desc: A group of violent and sadistic thugs overpower and abduct 19-year-old Kim Case from her driveway. And although they torture and rape her throughout the night, she ultimately proves to be a more formidable adversary than they ever imagined.

programme.title: Murder in the Family: Donatella Versace
programme.desc: Designer Donatella Versace's world in 1997 spins out of control when her brother Gianni is murdered.

programme.title: Murder in the Family: Aretha Franklin
programme.desc: In June 1979, burglars invade CL Franklin's home, and in a gunfight, Aretha's father is shot.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Bedroom Strangler
programme.desc: Women are being attacked in their beds at night. Police are baffled as to how this intruder is gaining access to apartments sometimes more than 15 stories up.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Casebook Rapist
programme.desc: An international student is found raped and murdered in the bathroom of her high-rise apartment.

programme.title: Crime Stories: David Shearing: The Wells Grey Gunman
programme.desc: In August of 1982, six members of the Bentley/Johnson family disappear in the Wells Grey National Park without a trace.
programme.sub-title: David Shearing: The Wells Grey Gunman

programme.title: Crime Stories: Girls Just Wanna Get Found
programme.desc: Cindy Zarzycki is 13 years old when she goes missing on her way to a Detroit ice cream store.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Lethal Injector
programme.desc: In 1996, nurses and patients at the Veteran's Affairs Medical Center in Northampton are concerned. It seems that wherever nurse Kristen Gilbert goes, death follows.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Yosemite Park Murderer
programme.desc: On Valentine's Day weekend 1999, three tourists from Yosemite National Park disappeared and were found murdered a month later.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 6
programme.desc: Nurse Hannah is running casualty, but there aren't enough porters to keep things moving.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 4
programme.desc: Physiotherapist helps 90-year-old Audrey who bashed her head in the hospital restaurant.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 3
programme.desc: A man with potential spine injuries is given pain relief while waiting for scan results.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts: Episode 8
programme.desc: The staff and patients of Barnsley's A&E department are put under the microscope.

programme.title: Ambulance: Code Red: Episode 5
programme.desc: The team have little time to save a woman who has collapsed.

programme.title: Ambulance: Code Red: Episode 6
programme.desc: Paramedics perform life-saving treatment on a car driver.

programme.title: Helicopter ER: From the Neck Down
programme.desc: The flying doctors and paramedics of the Yorkshire Air Ambulance head to the Peak District where a mountainbiker has sustained a broken neck.

programme.title: Helicopter ER: Victims Falling, or Falling Victim?
programme.desc: A herd of cows goes rogue and turns on its stockman, leaving him with life threatening injuries. The paramedics of the Air Ambulance fall victim to an elaborate hoax after a climber who claims to have fallen off a cliff face turns out to be unhurt.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 5
programme.desc: Biker paramedic Mark Hayes has to deal with an aggressivedrunk in the city centre and a young woman with epilepsy who's had several seizures. Biker cops in Essex are on a special night op hunting illegal road users.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 2
programme.desc: In the second of twelve episodes, our Biker Cops and Paramedics scythe through the most congested traffic in Europe, to get help where it’s most needed fast! In Birmingham, Biker Paramedic Steve Cooper battles to save a heroin addict after an overdose.

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 5
programme.desc: Birmingham biker paramedic Steve Harris races through packed city centre streets to help a man wracked by unexplained convulsions. Even an emergency transfer to hospital doesn’t bring an end to the mystery!

programme.title: Emergency Bikers: Episode 8
programme.desc: In Birmingham, biker paramedic Steve Harris races to an amateur football match where events have taken a dramatic turn. Stranded in a muddy field, his patient gripped by pain, Steve is left with only one choice – he has to scramble the air ambulance.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 5
programme.desc: A truck driver who had one leg amputated 40 years ago, has crashed his truck and crushed his remaining leg. If Rescue 1 can't get him to hospital in time, he will bleed to death.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 6
programme.desc: Westpac chopper paramedic Bruce Kerr has a frantic battle to save a car crash victim with a life-threatening head injury.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 4
programme.desc: The chopper team has an intense struggle to keep a young Waikato woman alive after her car collided with a heavy truck, an 18 year old man is in terrible pain with a dislocated shoulder, and a 9 year old boy is in a bad way after falling out of a tree.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 10
programme.desc: The Rescue 1 team are en route to the scene of a horrific accident. A pedestrian has been hit by a truck and is in a critical condition.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 10
programme.desc: A motocross rider may have broken his back after hitting a tree head on at high speed, at a sawmill a man faces its worse nightmares; and a woman is fighting for her life after taking an accidental overdose of her husband's medication.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 1
programme.desc: The Rescue 1 chopper team struggles to save two young men who are feared drowned at Hahei; a Coromandel motorcyclist is struggling with punctured lungs, and young man is trapped inside a car after a high speed accident.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 11
programme.desc: The team is responding to a life-threatening emergency. A cyclist in his 60s, Terrence Williams, is unresponsive and critical after an accident 15 minutes flying time from Auckland, near the small settlement of Maramarua.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 13
programme.desc: A 39 year old man has crashed his bike 15 kilometres south of Auckland city and an elderly man has collapsed while walking. He is unable to speak properly and is incorreherent at Waiheke Island.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Two consultations take surprising turns during questioning.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Caroline is convinced that her throat nodules are cancer.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: The doctors must deal with some troublesome patients.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: A young man with an ear cyst is suffering from depression.

programme.title: Scorpion: US vs. UN vs. UK
programme.desc: Team Scorpion is blackmailed to break into the United Nations to assist in the assassination of a menacing arms dealer.

programme.title: Scorpion: Arrivals And Departures
programme.desc: When Team Scorpion and Walter's parents visit Megan in the hospital as her health deteriorates, they are quarantined after a deadly fungus outbreak threatens to infect everyone.

programme.title: Scorpion: The Old College Try
programme.desc: Team Scorpion goes undercover at a university to find a hacker who infiltrates the Federal Reserve and threatens to collapse the world economy.

programme.title: Scorpion: Dam Breakthrough
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, Team Scorpion must prevent a catastrophe when torrential rains create a large crack in a dam, threatening to wipe out an entire town in its wake.

programme.title: Scorpion: White Out
programme.desc: In order to save a United States Special Forces unit from certain death, Team Scorpion must brave the subzero temperatures of Antarctica.

programme.title: Scorpion: Sun of a Gun
programme.desc: Sylvester comes face to face with his estranged father who asks Team Scorpion for help.

programme.title: Scorpion: Da Bomb
programme.desc: Team Scorpion is helping with NASA's top secret rocket launch, but they must sabotage their own mission.

programme.title: Scorpion: Fractured
programme.desc: After a powerful earthquake rocks Los Angeles, Team Scorpion must fix a pinched gas line to prevent a massive explosion.

programme.title: Scorpion: Adaptation
programme.desc: While Team Scorpion works to stop an influx of drugs being smuggled into the country via drones, Walter gives Happy and Toby an ultimatum on their new relationship.

programme.title: Scorpion: The Fast & The Nerdiest
programme.desc: After Sylvester scores big on THE PRICE IS RIGHT, Team Scorpion must infiltrate a high-end car smuggling operation about to ship bioweapons to South America.

programme.title: Scorpion: Ticker
programme.desc: When Los Angeles' blood supply is hacked and deemed unusable because of fear it's been tainted, Team Scorpion must find the culprit.

programme.title: Scorpion: Djibouti Call
programme.desc: While on a secret mission in Djibouti, Africa, with his new Homeland protege, Tim Armstrong (Scott Porter), Cabe is captured and Team Scorpion must save him.

programme.title: Scorpion: Twist And Shout
programme.desc: Team Scorpion's mission to recover the remains of fallen Marines in Vietnam is threatened along with their lives when a deadly tornado heads directly towards them.

programme.title: Scorpion: Hard Knox
programme.desc: Team Scorpion is hired by the Department of Defense to break into Fort Knox and "steal" a precious artifact in order to test their security.

programme.title: Scorpion: Chernobyl Intentions
programme.desc: Team Scorpion goes to Chernobyl to repair the decaying nuclear reactor before a catastrophic meltdown.

programme.title: Scorpion: Toby Or Not Toby
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must out-think their unstable ex-Scorpion member after he kidnaps Toby and threatens to kill him unless his cunning demands are met.

programme.title: Scorpion: Civil War
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must put aside their personal and romantic predicaments when anonymous hackers with unknown motives take control of U.S. military aircraft and warships and point weapons at American cities.

programme.title: Scorpion: And More Civil War
programme.desc: Just as Team Scorpion makes headway against the hackers controlling U.S. naval destroyers, they learn that a U.S. nuclear submarine also has been hacked and has a missile about to launch.

programme.title: Scorpion: It Isn't the Fall That Kills You
programme.desc: When Walter is accidentally launched into space in a rocket, he hallucinates about Paige as his oxygen runs low, and Team Scorpion works feverishly to find a way to bring him home before he suffocates.
programme.sub-title: It Isn't the Fall That Kills You

programme.title: Scorpion: Little Boy Lost
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must find a boy from Ralph's class who goes missing on a field trip after he accidentally has a run-in with a deadly criminal. Also, Toby gets closer to finding out the identity of Happy's husband.

programme.title: Scorpion: Plight At The Museum
programme.desc: Team Scorpion's simple job at the Los Angeles Natural History Museum turns deadly when they discover thieves robbing a rare gem exhibit in order to get materials needed to enrich a nuclear bomb.

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: Crisscross
programme.desc: Airachnid negotiates a deal with Silas to use Mech to exact revenge against Arcee and Jack.

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: Metal Attraction
programme.desc: Arcee and Bulkhead find their efforts to stop a Deception mission hampered by a magnetic device, which forces them to work more closely together than usual.

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: Rock Bottom
programme.desc: The Autobots, with Jack and Miko, fall victim to an Energon mine cave-in – and find themselves trapped with Starscream and Megatron!

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: Partners
programme.desc: Airachnid and Starscream are forced to partner to retrieve a powerful weapon; but upon being captured by Optimus and team, Starscream shockingly reveals that he would rather partner with the Autobots!

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: T.M.I.
programme.desc: When Bulkhead's brain is accidentally endowed with the secret formula for synthetic Energon, he becomes an intellectual recluse while the Decepticons hunt him down for the information.

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: Stronger, Faster
programme.desc: Ratchet, experimenting with synthetic Energon, injects himself with the substance—which makes him a menace to the Decepticons…but also to the Autobots and himself.

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: One Shall Fall
programme.desc: Megatron's attempt to fulfill an ancient Cybertronian prophecy results in one of our heroes becoming mortally wounded – and leads to a long-awaited rematch.

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: One Shall Rise: Part 1
programme.desc: When Earth becomes plagued by natural disasters, the Autobots come to the horrible realization that Dark Energon is the source of the bizarre events.

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: One Shall Rise: Part 2
programme.desc: Facing the greatest threat to Earth to date, the Autobots team with an unexpected ally.

programme.title: Transformers: Prime: One Shall Rise: Part 3
programme.desc: As the Autobots do battle at the Earth's core, Jack learns more about Optimus' past on Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: When a Cybertronian prison ship crashes on Earth, a new team of Autobots, led by Bumblebee, arrives to protect the planet—and the galaxy—from hundreds of escaped Deception fugitives!

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Pilot - Part 2
programme.desc: Following a mysterious message, BUMBLEBEE returns to Earth with unlikely companions to face a new Decepticon threat.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Trust Exercises
programme.desc: Bumblebee and his new allies struggle to find a teamwork dynamic as they protect Crown City from metal-devouring Underbite.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: More Than Meets the Eye
programme.desc: Bumblebee's new troop needs to hone their teamwork, but they'll have to do it on the fly as they face off against two more Decepticon fugitives – Sharkticon HAMMERSTRIKE and wolf-like STEELJAW.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: W.W.O.D.?
programme.desc: Fixit, craving the action of a field assignment, gets more than he bargained for when the Bee Team tries to keep wily Combiner CHOP SHOP from fleeing Earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: As the Kospego Commands
programme.desc: Beleaguered Bumblebee must learn to lead in his own way as the team struggles to bring in the brutish Buffaloid. Human scientists discovered TERRASHOCK, the stasis capsule.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Collect 'Em All
programme.desc: Sideswipe’s loyalty and dedication to the team come into question as he and Bumblebee track down Thunderhoof a Decepticon taking advantage of human folklore.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: True Colors
programme.desc: Bee and his team track FILCH, a crow-like Decepticon with an impulsive urge to steal all things “shiny,” who has taken Denny prisoner.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Rumble in the Jungle
programme.desc: Grimlock seems to turn against his friends, but the change of heart proves to have been caused by a miniature Decepticon taking control of his body and mind.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Can You Dig It?
programme.desc: Strongarm takes on her first “solo” mission—tracking the insane frog-like Decepticon SPRINGLOAD to the ruins of an ancient temple.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Adventures in Bumblebee-sitting!
programme.desc: The Bee Team welcomes visiting Autobot veteran JAZZ, just in time to fend off the massive Bot-worm PED – a petty crook bent on monopolizing Energon supplies.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Hunting Season
programme.desc: Infected by a Decepticon’s toxin, Bumblebee regresses to the maturity of a youngster, leaving the team essentially leaderless, chasing an escaped fugitive, and trying to keep tabs on the hyperactive lieutenant.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Out of Focus
programme.desc: The Bee team finds itself caught in the middle of a feud between rival bounty hunters, who are both out to claim a bounty on Bumblebee.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Sideways
programme.desc: Bee tries to keep his team from distraction as they fight MALODOR and his Skunkticon posse, while Optimus, in the realm of the Primes, undergoes a dangerous test administered by MICRONUS.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Even Robots Have Nightmares
programme.desc: Sideswipe blackmails Strongarm into doing all his work while the team tries to capture crab-like CLAMPDOWN, jailed for the very same crime back on Cybertron, before he can join Steeljaw’s Pack.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Some Body, Any Body
programme.desc: Denny and the Bots are captured by the bat-Decepticon NIGHTSTRIKE, who plunges the team members into their worst fears.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: One of Our Mini-Cons Is Missing
programme.desc: Mad-scientist VERTEBREAK captures Sideswipe, steals his body and stores the Autobot’s head in a jar, leaving Sideswipe to think he’s unable to contribute to the team.
programme.sub-title: One of Our Mini-Cons Is Missing

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Deep Trouble
programme.desc: After a dispute with his sensei, Drift, Jetstorm returns to Earth in the hopes of studying at the feet of a new master – Russell!

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: The Champ
programme.desc: Bee and the Team head to the ocean floor to capture Decepticon OCTOPUNCH, not knowing that Grimlock is covering up a serious injury.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: The Trouble With Fixit
programme.desc: An attempt to fix the ailing Fixit goes horribly wrong, turning the Mini-Con into a fully weaponized and lethal prison guard who mistakes the Bee Team for Decepticon fugitives.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Lock Out
programme.desc: After Steeljaw and his Pack commandeer the Scrapyard and its defense while the Bee Team is away, our heroes must find a way back in – or face an army of freed Decepticon prisoners.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Similarly Different
programme.desc: When Dinobot Scowl goes on a rampage, Grimlock briefly ponders a return to old habits, but comes to terms with the fact that not all Dinobots are good-guys.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: The Buzz on Windblade
programme.desc: The Bee Team allies with Windblade, another Decepticon-hunting Autobot, to take on Zizza, a mind-controlling queen-bee-'Con who has taken control of a small airport.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Ghosts and Imposters
programme.desc: An educational trip turns into a Decepticon hunt as Bee and the Bots stumble upon the shape-shifter Pseudo in a western ghost town.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Battlegrounds Part 1
programme.desc: As Optimus prepares to return to Earth to face the mysterious Great Evil he's prophesied to Bumblebee, the Bee Team tries to prevent Steeljaw's Pack from teleporting that very threat, the First Decepticon, Megatronus, back into Earth's dimension.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Battlegrounds Part 2
programme.desc: Reunited with Optimus Prime, Bee, and his team must use everything they’ve learned together to stop Megatronus from annihilating Earth and Cybertron in one fell swoop.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Overloaded – Part 1
programme.desc: The Autobots split into two teams, one facing an old foe of Bumblebee's and the other a Decepticon in the polar wastes.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Overloaded – Part 2
programme.desc: With an old score to settle, Bumblebee insists on taking on OVERLOAD alone, while a weakened Optimus must learn to contribute in ways others than combat if his team is to bring down POLARCLAW.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise: Metal Meltdown
programme.desc: As Steeljaw learns of a community of Decepticons in a surprising location, Grimlock and Strongarm struggle to improve their teamwork as, together with Bumblebee, they face SABERHORN.

programme.title: Survivorman: Fan Challenge
programme.desc: For the very first time, Les Stroud takes a fan into the wilderness to survive alongside him, showing him the ropes of what it takes to be Survivorman.

programme.title: Survivorman: Fighting To Survive
programme.desc: Les Stroud, TV's Survivorman, will teach Elias the ways of survival. However, he won't teach him everything he needs to know.

programme.title: Survivorman: Portland Oregon
programme.desc: Les goes to a secret location just outside of Portland, Oregon with his friend and filmmaker Devon Massyn in search of Bigfoot.

programme.title: Survivorman: Australian Outback
programme.desc: Forced to land his ultralight aircraft due to a miscalculation in fuel, Survivorman is once again out to endure the elements for seven days in this spectacular locale… the Australia Outback.

programme.title: Survivorman: Searching the Southwest
programme.desc: Les follows a trail from Texas to Utah in his quest to catch Bigfoot on camera. Locals report encounters in haunted mountains and spooky canyons, and Les applies scientific methods and his survival skills to lure the legend out of hiding.

programme.title: Survivorman: Tierra del Fuego
programme.desc: Les will be dropped into this inhospitable landscape of Tierra del Fuego, Argentina, the easternmost tip of Isla Grande and left to survive with no food, no shelter, no water, and no safety gear or camera crew.

programme.title: Survivorman: 24hrs
programme.desc: Les and Bill Engvall survive for 24 hours in the deserts of Nevada.

programme.title: Survivorman: Utah Canyonlands
programme.desc: Stroud will cannibalize the mountain-bike he has ridden into the middle of nowhere. He also has a multi-tool, a magnesium flint stick and an old energy bar that he uses for a purpose other than eating

programme.title: Survivorman: Lost at Sea
programme.desc: Les will be set adrift in an inflatable life raft off the coast of Belize. Not only does the life raft have a few bad water leaks, but it also leaks air, requiring Les to frequently re-inflate it.

programme.title: Survivorman: Giants of the Forest
programme.desc: Les returns to the wilderness of remote Alberta to investigate evidence of Sasquatch activity. Armed with infrared camera and thermal imaging technology, Les investigates reports of Bigfoot sightings in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: Survivorman: Sierra Nevada Search and Rescue
programme.desc: Les finds himself in the predicament of a lost hiker. Travelling with a typical "day hiker" pack – only provisions for an overnight stay – Les needs to make the most of what he's brought with him.

programme.title: Survivorman: Hunting in Temagami
programme.desc: After all his years of wilderness survival, the forests of Ontario's Temagami still rank as some of the most difficult, harrowing and challenging survival experiences Les has ever faced.

programme.title: Survivorman: African Plains
programme.desc: Survivorman Les Stroud arrives in South Africa via hot air balloon, and must immediately contend with potential danger from lions, hippos, water buffalo and the deadly black mamba.

programme.title: Survivorman: Costa Rica
programme.desc: Marooned on Costa Rica's Osa Peninsula, Les "Survivorman" Stroud has only a few items to aid him for the next 7 days: swimming goggles, 3 ballpoint pens, a multi-tool and the clothing on his back.

programme.title: Survivorman: Cook Islands, South Pacific
programme.desc: Les, equipped with only his scuba gear, is abandoned by his crew at sea to recreate a frightfully common occurrence; separated from your boat and left alone in the ocean waters.

programme.title: Survivorman: Incan O'ero High Priests
programme.desc: Les and crew climb to 16,000 ft up dangerous Mt. Sinkara to join 80,000 indigenous Andeans as they make their yearly pilgrimage to the holy site of Qollorit'i.

programme.title: Survivorman: The Hidden World
programme.desc: Les plants himself in Bigfoot hot spots across North America, collecting stories and experiences from Bigfoot believers, gathering and examining evidence to debunk the mysteries that surround this ancient legend.

programme.title: Survivorman: Georgian Swamp
programme.desc: The swamplands of Georgia's Altamaha River Basin are all that one would expect of a primordial bog; dank, menacing, swimming with slithering creepy crawlies and of course, alligator infested.

programme.title: Survivorman: Indonesia Mentawai
programme.desc: Les begins at the island of Siberut. He journeys 9 hours up river by boat, navigating log-jammed river systems and shallow waters, eventually trekking by foot into the heart of the island.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A skilled bomber is on the loose after a woman is blasted to smithereens in her own home and his motive for murder is investigated.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators span the globe to determine the cause of a little girl's death. Will two curious pieces of evidence help them solve the mystery?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: An off-duty policeman is shot to death and his fellow officers uncover minute evidence that helps to track down his killer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: In Wisconsin, USA, three people have been murdered and it's up to the investigators to sift through forensic evidence to track down the killer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Police track down a rental vehicle that was involved in the death of a pedestrian. Evidence inside the car leads to the killer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A young man dies during a hit and run boating accident and it's up to investigators to sift through over a thousand boats to find the right one.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators track down the killer of a victim who ingested large quantities of cyanide. The case turned up the most unlikely clue.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a high school athlete is killed in a hit and run accident, investigators hoped tiny paint chips and shards of plastic would lead them to the driver.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When it appears a killer has vanished into thin air, investigators struggle to determine how he entered and left the crime scene.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When two men appear to die of heart disease six years apart, police notice they have one thing in common. At the time of their deaths, each was married to the same woman.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Casino security cameras offer the final images of a woman just before she vanished without a trace, but can these grainy images lead police to her killer?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When the only witnesses to a horrific murder were the victim's dogs, police call in a canine behavioural expert with the hope of making a breakthrough in the case.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: With a long list of suspects, forensic experts are clear on one thing in this brutal murder, the killer knew his victim.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Police are on the hunt for a serial killer. Could a bloody fingerprint on one of his victims be the breakthrough they need?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A husband and wife had been shot to death in their bedroom. Investigators thought their 16-year-old daughter was lucky to have escaped unharmed.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a hairdresser is murdered in her salon, evidence fails to convict a suspect. The case goes cold for ten years, until a mysterious witness finally speaks up.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: An 18-month-old skeleton found on marshland puts forensics to the ultimate test. But with no name and no face, how much can computer construction help a case?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Having bagged-up the evidence and thrown it into a river, a multi-murderer is shocked to hear police have recovered it. But is there enough in the bag for them to convict a killer?

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Police investigate the possibility of a hate crime when two women go missing and are later found murdered.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When three students are brutally murdered close to campus, investigators must determine what the women had in common before their serial killer strikes again.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Real crimes are solved using medical techniques. When a security guard disappeared it took a year to find his body.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: In a tragic twist of fate, a woman is found dead just days after she sold her home and moved out. Find out if she anticipated an attack, and who had wanted her dead.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Police get a big break when Mother Nature aids their investigation into the murder of a woman at her business.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: An eyewitness to a real estate agent's murder is put under forensic hypnosis in an attempt to help him recall the killer's face.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Police launch a search for a killer after a teenager returns home to find his father's body in a pool of blood. Footprints in the snow outside may be crucial to the case.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A pathologist examining the death of a politician who was running for re-election finds tiny puncture wounds at the autopsy.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Naval officer who threatened to go public with tales of on-the-job sexual harassment and assault is brutally murdered, but when investigators find the allegations could be part of an elaborate scheme for money, they turn to forensic science.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A few drops of blood are the only clues left behind by a female killer, but years later and hundreds of miles away investigators hear an intriguing story about an exotic dancer who got away with murder.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: After police identify a murder victim thanks to her butterfly necklace, they discover that several of her colleagues had vendettas against her.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Canada's only forensic optometrist uses a squashed tomato and a mere pinpoint reflection of light to uncover the identity of a killer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Ten years after the murder of a rock singer, forensic scientists use evidence collected by an investigator to finally bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A professor of geological sciences helps police get the 'dirt' on the killer of a missing university student, hoping he can lead them to her murderer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A pair of tennis shoes are found near a victim who had been stabbed on the beach, less than ten yards from her hotel.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Two years after a girl went missing from her home, a new finger print examiner arrives in Colorado. He reveals a little-known fact, entirely changing the police investigation.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Groundbreaking tests reveal the race, eye colour and hair colour of the person responsible for killing two young women on Halloween night.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: With no money, no lawyer and only a fifth grade education, a convicted murderer has a slim chance of overturning his guilty verdict, but that won't stop him trying.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: After a young girl recants the testimony that convicted her uncle for murder, his wife battles to find the real killer, hoping his denial of a retrial will be overturned.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: In 1984 police failed to convict the murderer of a college student. Can new technology finally help the police to catch her killer?

programme.title: Giant Constructions: Steel Bridges
programme.desc: Steel bridges are extremely durable and multifunctional, fascinating not only due to its gigantic size but also because of the army of workers keeping the bridges in shape: whether on the historical landmark in Sydney or ultramodern mega bridges in China.

programme.title: Giant Constructions: Railway Bridges
programme.desc: Railway bridges fascinate through different construction methods from masonry, truss-beam bridges to steel-concrete arch bridge. Heavier loads, faster speeds, more frequently: trains speed over bridges and the maintenance teams face ever larger challenges

programme.title: NEW: Top 10: Architecture: BRIDGES & CITY ICONS
programme.desc: Here are ten of the world greatest modern bridges - engineering marvels and architectural masterpieces from around the world

programme.title: NEW: Top 10: Architecture: TRANSPORT MEGASTRUCTURES & ENGINEERING WONDERS
programme.desc: The Trans-Siberian Railway, New York City Subway, Channel Tunnel and Suez Canal are only some of the breathtaking megastructures devised by humanity.

programme.title: NEW: Top 10: Architecture: MUSEUMS AND GALLERIES & ARCHITECTURAL TREASURES
programme.desc: Bilbao, Amsterdam, Antwerp and Florence belong to a dynamic group of cities that preserve the heritage of humanity through museums.

programme.title: NEW: Top 10: Architecture: TV TOWERS & COMPLEX AND GRACIOUS
programme.desc: Television towers are a distinctive type of structure that have long transcended the utilitarian purpose they were designed for.

programme.title: NEW: Top 10: Architecture: STADIUMS & STUNNING ARENAS
programme.desc: Sports stadiums are widely considered architectural treasures, on par with shrines, cathedrals and other important monuments.

programme.title: Giant Hubs: Munich Airport
programme.desc: The Munich based Franz Joseph Strauss Airport is rated the only 5-Star airport in Europe. And it is also one of Europe´s biggest hubs. An average 1.100 flights have to be taken care of every day, 44.6 million passengers chose Munich as destination.

programme.title: Giant Hubs: Port of Rotterdam
programme.desc: The Port of Rotterdam is among the largest logistics centers in the world. With a handling capacity of about one million three hundred thousand tons – per day!

programme.title: Giant Hubs: Shinjuku Station
programme.desc: A look behind the scenes of the world’s busiest station: Shinjuku Station! Five separate train lines, almost three thousand passengers per minute and trains arriving every second.

programme.title: Giant Hubs: UPS Worldport
programme.desc: What does it take to deliver millions of packages and documents every day right in time? You need a Giant Hub: UPS Worldport in Louisville is a technological marvel. It is the largest automated package handling facility in the world.

programme.title: Giant Hubs: Rungis Food Market
programme.desc: Rungis International Market is the world's largest wholesale market for fresh produce. Fish, meat, fruits, vegetables, cheese and even fresh flowers are sold here every day in quantities so large an entire train station.

programme.title: Giant Hubs: Moscow Metro
programme.desc: It is one of the biggest and busiest metro systems in the world: The Moscow Metro. During rush hour the trains are running every 90 seconds to transport around 9 million people daily – that makes 2.3 billion a year.

programme.title: Mega Transports: Gigantic Autoliner
programme.desc: A transport to the other side of the globe. The Höegh Trapper is the largest automobile transporter in the world. Two hundred meters long, thirty-six meters wide.

programme.title: Mega Transports: Antonov
programme.desc: A giant of the skies - the Antonov AN-124-100M-150. Worldwide the biggest production cargo aircraft of all time. No aircraft can transport more goods than the Russian giant.

programme.title: Mega Transports: Wind Park
programme.desc: A wind park needs to get from Europe to Asia. Over two thousand tons of highly sensitive and valuable cargo. On one of the world's largest heavy lift vessels.

programme.title: Mega Transports: Siberian Ice Road
programme.desc: A Mega Transport on one of the most dangerous roads in the world. The Siberian Ice Road. It doesn't forgive mistakes. It's treacherous. And unpredictable.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Recap
programme.desc: This week, we sit down with Bryan Golie, Jeff Darrah, Joe Kambic, and John Lasofsky as they recount what they've been through in their careers as well as what happened this past season.

programme.title: Wardens: Antler Raiders
programme.desc: This week, Montana game wardens try to control the masses as the gates open and antler hunters are set free to find their trophies.

programme.title: Wardens: Across The Seeded Fields
programme.desc: Montana game wardens work the opening day of pronghorn season as they monitor legal and illegal hunting practices, as well as protecting the seeded fields from undue harm.

programme.title: Wardens: Guts
programme.desc: This week, Montana game wardens deal with the opening day of deer season and all the trouble that goes along with it.

programme.title: Wardens: In The Drink
programme.desc: This week, Montana game wardens deal with some of the many water issues they deal with including littering, under- age drinking, and the annual Yellowstone Boat Float.

programme.title: Wardens: Warrants & Weed
programme.desc: This week, game wardens deal with repeat offenders and people with outstanding warrants that only make matters worse when confronted.

programme.title: Wardens: Cheeseheads
programme.desc: This week, game wardens are looking for poachers and those not hunting within the law, all with a little help from full size decoys and local citizens calling in to the TIP-MONT hotline.

programme.title: Wardens: Three-Fifty-Seven
programme.desc: This week, game wardens try and track down a potential poacher who took a deer out of season. Then, we'll follow another warden as he takes his son hunting when his son draws a hard to come by moose tag.

programme.title: Wardens: Mercy Kill
programme.desc: Warden Kambic investigates a wounded elk and the hunter who tried to do the right thing.

programme.title: Wardens: Tangled
programme.desc: A wounded deer has locked horns with another buck creating a dilemma for Warden Burroughs.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Home Run
programme.desc: After a community-outreach baseball game erupts in a drive-by shooting, Gail’s relationship with her brother is put to the test . Meanwhile, Swarek plans a getaway with Andy up to Oliver’s cabin, which goes off the rails in every possible way

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Best Man
programme.desc: Andy and Sam are shocked to learn that Oliver is the prime suspect in IA’s corruption investigation into 15 Division. They only have until end of day today to find Chris Klem – the missing explosives-dealer – and clear Oliver’s name

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Integrity Test
programme.desc: With Oliver still the prime suspect in the bombing of 15’s evidence room, Andy, Dov, Gail, and Nick undertake a risky – and potentially career-ending – plan to prove that Commissioner Alonso Santana is corrupt.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Ninety Degrees
programme.desc: Andy heads out with a very-pregnant Marlo to find a volatile woman who’s gone missing after group therapy, but neither Andy nor Marlo are prepared when Marlo suddenly goes into labor.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Breaking Up the Band
programme.desc: Now that Sam and Marlo’s baby girl has arrived (Ep. 520), it’s clear nothing could have prepared Andy for this moment. So when Juliet offers Andy an opportunity to leave town for 4 months on an undercover project, Andy starts to consider it.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: 74 Epiphanies
programme.desc: Andy and Sam’s wedding comes just in time for the gang to celebrate one last hurrah. But when Andy is taken off-course by a hitchhiker and then stranded on the side of a dead-end road with a dying man, she finds herself with no way to get help

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Blink
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the night’s traumatic events, Andy and Dov try to pull themselves together at an all-night diner, but are caught off-duty and off-guard in a volatile diner hold-up.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: All by Her Selfie
programme.desc: Oliver gets promoted and Andy is tasked with training 15 Division’s newest rookie, Duncan Moore. But when Andy and Duncan respond to a messy homicide at a pawnshop, it’s clear this rookie is going to give Andy the challenge of a lifetime.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Heart Breakers, Money Makers
programme.desc: When Andy and Nick’s seizure at an illegal gambling house leads to a suspicious confession, Andy recruits Sam to help figure out who’s lying, why, and where the money is, before anyone gets hurt.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Wanting
programme.desc: When a tenement-building shooting leads to the discovery of an executed gang leader, 15 Division must race to find the killer before a gang war breaks out

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Going Under
programme.desc: When 15 Division goes undercover at a club-land bar that’s a possible hub for illegal handguns, Chris’s erratic behavior and concern for a specific drug dealer make Dov suspicious.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Two Truths and a Lie
programme.desc: As the officers of 15 Division try to hunt down the killer of Brian Gowdy – Andy and Sam go on the road to interview a list of inmates at Millburn Penitentiary.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Deal with the Devil
programme.desc: In the midst of a chaotic day at the station, Oliver prepares Andy to defend herself at Duncan’s dismissal hearing, now happening two hours from now

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Exit Strategy
programme.desc: Chris’s addiction issues come to a head when an innocuous call to a middle-class home puts Dov and Chris in the middle of a suspicious home invasion investigation

programme.title: Rookie Blue: "Moving Day"
programme.desc: 15 Division is assigned to a community outreach program, “Moving Day”, to help tenants move out of a subsidized-housing complex that’s being torn down

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Fragments
programme.desc: Andy’s former rookie, Duncan, is back on duty and looking to reconcile – something she’s not ready for yet. But personal feelings get thrust aside when a bomb explodes in a downtown parking garage

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Everlasting
programme.desc: The officers of 15 Division work to track down TED MCDONALD (the car-bomber from Ep. 510). But even after catching him, they realize Ted has more targets set to explode out there. The clock is ticking

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Open Windows
programme.desc: Andy is attacked by an intruder at Traci’s place and the Sex Crimes Unit steps in to take over the case their way, 15 Division will have decide whether to take matters into their own hands.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Perfect Family
programme.desc: Andy’s ideas about what makes a perfect family are put into perspective when she meets an out-of-control teen who needs to be protected from her own conservative family.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Uprising
programme.desc: A riot breaks out at a women’s correctional institute while Andy, Juliet, Nick, and Gail are there to transfer prisoners. They end up in a lock-down situation that finds Andy and Juliet trapped with a woman desperate to prove her innocence

programme.title: The Legend of Hercules
programme.desc: Exiled and sold into slavery because of a forbidden love, Hercules (Kellan Lutz) must use his formidable powers to fight his way back to his rightful kingdom.

programme.title: Mongolian Death Worm
programme.desc: An oil company uses the dangerous fracking method to capture oil, and wakes a nest of deadly creatures that have been dormant for centuries, the Mongolian Death Worms.

programme.title: The Stranger
programme.desc: Chased by Russian gangsters and the FBI, a former member (Steve Austin) of an elite task force must piece together the puzzle of his memory loss.

programme.title: The Condemned
programme.desc: A death-row inmate from a Central American jail is among the prisoners taken to a remote island for a to-the-death match broadcast live over the Internet.

programme.title: Mongolian Death Worm
programme.desc: An oil company uses the dangerous fracking method to capture oil, and wakes a nest of deadly creatures that have been dormant for centuries, the Mongolian Death Worms.

programme.title: The Stranger
programme.desc: Chased by Russian gangsters and the FBI, a former member (Steve Austin) of an elite task force must piece together the puzzle of his memory loss.

programme.title: Hellboy: Sword of Storms
programme.desc: A possessed professor dispatches several creatures to retrieve a powerful sword held by Hellboy (Ron Perlman).

programme.title: Fred 3: Camp Fred
programme.desc: Forced to attend summer camp, a teen (Lucas Cruikshank) and his new friends compete against rivals in a series of games.

programme.title: Akeelah and the Bee
programme.desc: Akeelah (Keke Palmer), an 11-year-old girl living in South Los Angeles, discovers she has a talent for spelling, which she hopes will take her to the National Spelling Bee.

programme.title: The Honor List
programme.desc: Four girls sink a time capsule in a lake with a list of things they want to do before graduation, but they all go separate ways before graduating. When a tragedy strikes, they reunite to find the capsule and complete the bucket list.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Resurrection
programme.desc: Doors makes a public appearance, leading to an increase in anti-Taelon sentiment. The Taelon Synod is fed up with Da'an and sends Zo'or in his stead.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Horizon Zero
programme.desc: A high profile mission to Mars is suddenly canceled, much to the dismay of the public. Involved air force captain Paul Chandler steals Lili's shuttle.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Scopions Dream
programme.desc: Dr. Larry Clark is a bio engineer who works on the skrills. When the companions decide to get rid of a series, one of them joins with Clark.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Live Free or Die
programme.desc: Navy Seal major Raymond McIntyre kidnaps Da'an and demands to know where his men are. They were involved in a inter-dimensional space flight test that went wrong.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Resistance
programme.desc: Helen and Henry break into a government abnormal research facility called SCIU - only to find it is run by Tesla. Biggie and Will deal with an annoying abnormal named Galvo.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Homecoming
programme.desc: Will's trip to Liberia turns bad when he suffers a head trauma from an attack. The trauma brings up powerful memories about his mothers death and the inadequacies of his father. Magnus deals with be-winged scam artist.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Icebreaker
programme.desc: Henry and Declan lead a team to rescue a crew of a Russian icebreaker and the abnormal passengers

programme.title: Sanctuary: Fugue
programme.desc: FBI Agent Abby Corrigan's life is endangered after she is suddenly attacked by an unfamiliar abnormal during an investigation. Magnus and Will's heated debate over the best way to help Abby threatens to permanently alter their relationship

programme.title: Sanctuary: Chimera
programme.desc: There is a sentient organic nanite causing havoc in the computer system in the Sanctuary. Magnus and Tesla connect their minds to the system in an effort to isolate the nanite. They find Adam Worth instead

programme.title: Sanctuary: Acolyte
programme.desc: A radical group of abnormal beings plan a terrorist attack with the goal of starting a war between surface dwellers and hollow Earth inhabitants. To Magnus' disbelief, Addison, at the NSA, has proof of Biggie's leadership of the group.

programme.title: Sanctuary: The Depths
programme.desc: When Magnus and Will learn of a plan to capture very rare and dangerous Abnormal, they travel to a remote cave to prevent then hunt.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Sanctuary for None Pt 1
programme.desc: When the Sanctuary is approached by an abnormal leader about a radical plan for peace, Magnus goes all in and pledges her full support. However, when Will is forced to leave the Sanctuary, his decision may just put everyone at risk.

programme.title: Sanctuary: Sanctuary for None Pt 2
programme.desc: SCIU has surrounded the 5th Ward with troops and an electric shield that prevents them from leaving. Caleb has a virus that can turn the human population into abnormals. Magnus enacts her ultimate plan for the Sanctuary network

programme.title: The Lost World: Amazons
programme.desc: The men find themselves embraced by a tribe of Amazons and discover they are to be studs for the breeding ritual, but this purpose may come with a fatal end.

programme.title: The Lost World: Tourist Season
programme.desc: Challenger builds a windmill. But when his generator is struck by lightning, a portal is opened that ushers in a helicopter carrying a family of tourists from the year 2000.

programme.title: The Lost World: Stone Cold
programme.desc: An ominous castle draws three of the adventurers under its paranormal influence. Roxton, Marguerite, and Malone take on new personalities while the mansion entangles them in a love triangle.

programme.title: The Lost World: Divine Right
programme.desc: A riderless horse leads Roxton to a tribe that makes him king. He must either accept the title or face execution, while the rest of the group is captured.

programme.title: The Lost World: Skin Deep
programme.desc: When Marguerite begins acting uncharacteristically nice, the group raises some questions. A stumbling dinosaur in the jungle holds the answer: an alien life force has begun controlling their bodies.

programme.title: Mutant X
programme.desc: A boy who's developing new mutant abilities has been kidnapped and the team agrees to find him for his mother. They later learn she was the one who had her son kidnapped.

programme.title: Alien Agenda: Planet Earth
programme.desc: Alien Agenda Planet Earth reveals the shocking truth about UFOs and Extraterrestrials, a truth that has been suppressed and hidden for centuries.

programme.title: Close Encounters: Proof of Alien Contact
programme.desc: This documentary examines whether UFOs are real. It studies over 250 amateur video clips, evaluates several recent revelations about Roswell, and examines footage of the removal of an alien implant.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Kecksburg UFO
programme.desc: This episode includes: Kecksburg UFO (Pts. 1 & 2), Update: Pizza Man & 3rd Anniversary Reunion, Unknown Arsonist & UD and Hospital Babynap.

programme.title: The Falcon Lake Incident
programme.desc: Aliens visit Earth often; Canada's 1967 Falcon Lake UFO incident stands out. Canada's frequent sightings make it enigmatic.

programme.title: The UFO Battle of Los Angeles
programme.desc: 1942 LA: A mysterious UFO causes blackout & artillery fire. Remains unexplained.

programme.title: Aliens Among Us: The Michael Wolf Theory
programme.desc: Michael K. Wolf shares 30 years of insights on UFOs, aliens, government projects, and crop circles.

programme.title: Aliens and Pyramids
programme.desc: Many pyramidal structures around the world exhibit strange glyphs of futuristic objects and signs of advanced machining with laser perfection. Was there help from an extraterrestrial source?

programme.title: Alien Abduction: The Mystery Unraveled
programme.desc: This docudrama explores the boundaries of human imagination and fascinating biological phenomena to reveal the scientific roots of a modern-day mythology.

programme.title: Alien Contact: UFO Invaders
programme.desc: Hundreds of UFOs have crashed on Earth. Mankind has witnessed these crashes, communicated with the visitors, even left our planet with them once they are able to return to their worlds, but the most shocking revelation is the reason why they come.

programme.title: Confessions Of An Alien Abductee
programme.desc: Chantelle, Marie and Simon are all alien abductees. These ordinary people share their extraordinary stories as they seek help through the curiously named Anomalous Mind Management Abductee Contactee Helpline, or AMMACH.

programme.title: Alien Cyclops: The Extraordinary Case of Sagrada Familia
programme.desc: In 1963 Brazil, three children witness a UFO in their backyard. An alien cyclops descends, and Mr. Alberto investigates the phenomenon.

programme.title: From the Mothman to the Reptilians: A Guide to Alien Species
programme.desc: Witnesses from around the world have had close encounters with extraterrestrial races, shaping our imagination and becoming cultural phenomena.

programme.title: UFO Hunters II: Tales from the Universe
programme.desc: Italian ufologists explore alien evidence in history & folklore. Have we been watched since ancient times?

programme.title: 27 Alien Encounters
programme.desc: Strange and bizarre UFO encounters abound, but recent Alien encounters by highly credible eyewitnesses are so unusual and perplexing that they challenge our understanding of physics and the Universe as we know it.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 15
programme.desc: Hayley's cheeky cartoon tattoo is threatening to derail her wedding plans. Mick wants to cover an X-rated inking that's causing embarrassment to his daughter. Dom's saucy camel is giving him the hump.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 13
programme.desc: Sketch rids Ben of a silly spooning tattoo. Jay fixes Matt's backside-based chat-up line.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 4
programme.desc: John's tattoo is on another planet, while Alec has made a big mistake with a tiny inking.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 5
programme.desc: Sketch conceals a large portrait on Les. Alice spreads Becca's favourite food on her leg.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 2
programme.desc: Sketch slays Fiona's zombie, while Glen gives magician George a frightening new friend.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 7
programme.desc: Sketch meets Billy, whose habit of tattooing himself to impress ladies has got out of hand.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 4
programme.desc: Michael needs help with a holiday tattoo that's writing cheques his anatomy can't cash. Superfan Emma wants to commit to ink her love for Cheryl Fernandez-Versini. A fire-eater lights up Jay's eyes.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 14
programme.desc: Sketch and Jay double team Luke's bum art, Alice eases Katie's period pain, Glen puts a snowman on ice while Sketch tattoos a butcher who minced his arm off.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 8
programme.desc: Eccentric dancer Marina wants a confidence-boosting tattoo cover to get her back onto the podium. The artists see double when identical twins Hayley and Rebecca come in with matching bad body art.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 6
programme.desc: Sketch meets Gaz, who has his best friend's initials in an intimate place, and the whole team are shocked by the cover-up he wants. Jay gives Lady Gaga superfan Harry the portrait of his dreams.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 5
programme.desc: Lou helps tomboy Lucy, who has a vulgar phrase tattooed on her leg. Skater boy Matt shows Sketch a tattoo in an unsightly place. Jay assists Amina, who thinks getting inked is worse than giving birth.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 1
programme.desc: Jay banishes Ant's backside buddy, and Alice helps Chelsea get over the shock of her life.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 1
programme.desc: Jay saves Luke's bacon with a polished portrait. Sketch beautifies Mark's belly Buddha.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 3
programme.desc: House fire survivor Steve has his scarring covered with a Celtic knot design, Amy swaps an embarrassing marriage proposal for a tribute to her favourite dinosaur, and Sam's X-rated nickname is hidden.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 14
programme.desc: The artists cover Zoe's tattoo dedicated to her favourite food, Sean's lewd and lengthy leprechaun that his wife wants rid of, and Chantal's pitiful pop portrait that looks like a famous footballer.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 8
programme.desc: Victoria is in desperate need of a tattoo cover-up so she can train as a teacher. Abigail gets inked at the age of 75, Hollie loses her cheeky chicken ink, and Lisa divorces a big tattoo mistake.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 11
programme.desc: Alice cooks up a treat for ex-chef Melody. Jay helps Az make a wise choice about his past.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 7
programme.desc: Jay, Sketch and Alice face Scott's manscaping stickmen, Chelsea's superfan signature, and Jack's silly souvenir. Meanwhile, fun-loving divorcee Kat, partygoing parents Kay and Richard, and diabetic Sean all go under the needle.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A widow reluctantly parts with her husband's treasured collection of Rolls Royces and Bentleys, and an impulse buyer finds one of the cars a new home.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: The team struggles to explain how a DAF 33 gearbox works, and office manager Sarah attempts to bring order to the auto memorabilia sale.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave finds a very rare 70s Sunbeam Lotus that has been rotting away in a farmyard for 29 years, while a Morris Minor convertible goes under the hammer.

programme.desc: This show sees DJ Matt Edmondson lead his teammates TV legend Debbie McGee, dancer Kimberley Wyatt, retired footballer Michael Owen and reality TV star Chris Hughes.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 2
programme.desc: It's takes self-belief, attitude and quick wits to conquer the maze. Tonight's team, The London Girls, are over-flowing with two of the three. Will Maze Master Richard Ayoade ever be able to keep control of this calamitous and kamikaze bunch?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 14
programme.desc: This week it’s the turn of a team of midwives to face the maze. These five feisty females prove how important communication is, by demonstrating the consequences of not listening to each other.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 15
programme.desc: The Ali Family are arguably the strongest team on paper ever to face the maze. Will they score a perfect ten in the zones?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 13
programme.desc: In tonight’s show we see a team of police officers hoping to lay down the law in the maze…but will they end up locked behind bars?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 9
programme.desc: This week the Hauxwell tackle the maze with remarkable results. How bad can it get in the maze? You’re about to find out…

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 5
programme.desc: In tonight’s show a team called The Cheerleaders, five disproportionately excitable young ladies, hope enthusiasm will help them in their quest through the maze.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 3
programme.desc: Maze Master Richard Ayoade leads The Holmes Family around the maze as they attempt to win precious crystals and not have a major falling out.

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 7
programme.desc: An all-female footballing team hope to score in the maze tonight. Will they play defensively or go on the attack?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 6
programme.desc: In tonight’s show Team Well Read and Underfed, a group of plucky students, attempt to take on the maze. Will they graduate with honours?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 2
programme.desc: The Air Cadets bring a bravado bonanza to the maze this week. They begin the night predicting big things, but will they deliver?

programme.title: The Crystal Maze: Episode 6
programme.desc: Tonight's team are The Science Nerds, proving that just because you put the words 'science' and 'nerds' in the name of your team does not necessarily mean anyone should expect competence.

programme.title: Mob Wives starts at 9pm
programme.desc: Welcome to Staten Island, the land of fierce women who never admit to being allegedly "connected" - until now. Left alone to pick up the pieces, these women face the harsh realities of "life" after informants have turned their families' lives upside down.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Mob Knives
programme.desc: The Staten Island spouses return. Renee receives a letter from Junior and fears she and AJ are being targeted, and Drita and Big Ang attempt to settle an on-going feud.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Joe's newest girlfriend is introduced to Carla, and the duo explain their serious relationship. Drita is unsure whether to take her kids to visit their father in prison.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Threats And Thongs
programme.desc: Renee is in shock after she opens a malicious letter from Junior. Ramona is scared about her boy-friend's upcoming court appearance.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Of Vice And Men
programme.desc: Drita decides that it's time to go visit Lee in prison with their daughters. Carla goes on with her life while Joe is preparing to terminate his marriage with Carla.

programme.title: Mob Wives: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: Ramona is forced to finally confront Drita over a birthday party invitation. Renee tries to turn a corner at rehab but has a hard time letting go of her anger.

programme.title: Mob Wives: After The Storm
programme.desc: The aftermath of Hurricane Sandy lands on the Mob wives' doorstep. Overwhelmed by the storm's devastation, they make efforts to help each other and their neighbours.

programme.title: Mob Wives: No Love Lost
programme.desc: Drita discusses Lee's surprise release from prison, and Karen and Ramona get wind of Lee's return to town. Meanwhile, Renee returns from her spell at rehab.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Time And Punishment
programme.desc: Ramona reveals her secret engagement to Karen. Meanwhile, Drita celebrates her newfound romance, and sparks fly between Karen and her slick studio partner.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Mama Drama
programme.desc: Ang throws a festive holiday bash, but it turns ugly. Meanwhile Karen and Ramona join forces to confront Carla. Plus, Renee goes on a road trip to find an attack dog.

programme.title: Mob Wives: Desert Storm
programme.desc: Karen moves forward and boldly tries to reopen her father 's case. Meanwhile, Ang speaks to Drita about Love 's ongoing problems with Carla.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Sharon Whelan and her two daughters were murdered in their home on Christmas eve by a cold and calculating killer. Multi-discipline forensics uncovered his horrific actions and brought him to justice.
programme.sub-title: The Murders of Sharon, Zarah and Nadia Whelan

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: In February 2012, a man got into a pick-up truck at a mall close to his home and was never seen alive again. Nine months later, after a huge search was launched, police discovered his human remains.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Following the investigation into the death of Nikitta Grender and the extensive forensics that identified her killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The search for Lori Hackingfollows the investigation into her disappearance and how a multitude of forensic techniques revealed her killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: 'Conned to Death' covers the murder of Michele MacNeill and how investigators and forensics brought her killer to justice.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: When the body of Paul Gault was discovered in the bedroom of his house, police began to uncover the facts behind a brutal murder.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: By September 1973, with three murders in just three months, South Wales Police realised they were looking for Wales' first documented serial killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: 15-year-old Janet Commins was savagely murdered, her body hidden in undergrowth. 40 years later, DNA profiling eventually helped to catch the killer.
programme.sub-title: Unravelling the Murder of Janet Commins

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: After body parts were found in a Dublin city canal, a broad forensic investigation was needed to identify the victim, and lead police to those responsible.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The mutilated bodies of two women sparked a massive police manhunt. With advances in forensic science, investigators brought Ireland's only living serial killer to justice.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The murder investigation surrounding the death of a young, defenceless woman led police to another case, where the science of DNA profiling helped to unravel the truth.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: A killer, who identified then murdered his victims, caused a manhunt which lasted nearly three decades. The science of DNA eventually led to his capture.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Beverly Therrien and her two lodgers were found beaten to death and despite the killer's careful planning, investigators identified and linked him to the crime.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Following the investigation into a body found in a plastic container and how the killer is found.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Following the 35-year investigation and forensic advances that identify Rosa's savage killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The story of a sadistic crime and how investigators brought the merciless attacker to justice.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The investigation to catch a serial rapist and how advanced DNA technology finally tracked him down.
